list.vod_blurb: A father attempts to reconcile with his estranged daughter by inviting her to his rural retreat for
list.vod_content: A father attempts to reconcile with his estranged daughter by inviting her to his rural retreat for a special birthday dinner. But when the home is invaded by two masked women armed with shotguns, a lethal game of cat and mouse ensues, culminating in a life-altering revelation.

list.vod_blurb: Three coworkers on the night shift at a remote diner get in over their heads after digging for proof
list.vod_content: Three coworkers on the night shift at a remote diner get in over their heads after digging for proof that one of their customers is a serial killer.
